_comment: spec-0.12.5 D-4 perf baseline. Recorded once on Apple M5 Max (arm64, darwin). Gate per spec § 2.2 outcome table: BenchmarkLayout1000Nodes < 5ms/op required for A 自研; otherwise outcome → B/C.

benchmarks.name: Layout1000Nodes
benchmarks.note: HARD GATE (< 5_000_000 ns = 5ms). Result: 0.097ms, 51× margin under gate

benchmarks.name: Layout5CCSamples
benchmarks.note: 5 locked CC samples aggregated per iteration

outcome_input.rationale: All 5/5 CC samples pass with both critical samples passing; BenchmarkLayout1000Nodes well under 5ms gate (51× margin). Per spec § 2.2 outcome table this maps to A 自研 outcome.
